basic_profile.headline: Co-CEO of Hightouch | AI for Marketers
basic_profile.name: Tejas Manohar
basic_profile.summary:
Co-Founder of Hightouch, the leading Composable CDP and AI Decisioning platform for marketing teams. Build AI agents, uncover insights, and deliver hyper-personalized marketing with all your data.

https://www.hightouch.com/
Email tejas [at] hightouch [dot] io or message me on LinkedIn

current.company_description: Hightouch is the leading Composable CDP and Agentic Marketing Platform that empowers marketers to answer questions, uncover opportunities, and activate data.
current.description:
We're building the AI for marketers

We're also #1 in Composable CDP

YC Summer 2019 Batch
current.name: Hightouch
current.title: Cofounder and Co-CEO

past.description: This was my first "professional" experience. I jumped around from IE6 support to blocking spammers to optimizing performance (caching, load balancing, etc.) for a Rails app.
past.name: Populr
past.title: Software Engineer Intern

past.company_description: There's a place in tech for everyone.We want all students to have the skills to use code as a means of creativity and making real, practical changes to their world.
past.description: I founded CodeDay Nashville and organized the St. Louis event, which I attended the previous year. CodeDay is a 24-hour coding marathon for middle school to college students. I was responsible for recruiting, promotion, sponsorship, and more.
past.name: CodeDay
past.title: Regional Manager

past.company_description: HubSpot is a leading agentic customer platform that provides software and support to help businesses grow better. Our platform includes marketing, sales, service, and website management products that start free and scale to meet our customers’ needs at any stage of growth. Today, thousands of customers around the world use our powerful and easy-to-use tools and integrations to attract, engage, and delight customers.HubSpot's award-winning culture has been recognized by Glassdoor, Great Place to Work, Comparably, Fortune, Entrepreneur, Inc., and more. We build connections, careers, and employee growth by creating a workplace that values flexibility, autonomy, and transparency. You can learn more about our commitment to creating an inclusive and diverse workplace in the HubSpot Culture Code.HubSpot is a flexible company with employees working fully remotely, from an office, or a mix of the two. We are headquartered in Cambridge, MA with offices in Amsterdam, Berlin, Bogota, Dublin, Ghent, London, Madrid, Paris, San Francisco, Singapore, Sydney, Tokyo and Toronto. To learn more about HubSpot, visit www.hubspot.com and to join our team, visit www.hubspot.com/careers
past.description: I worked on Singularity, an Apache Mesos framework, and built an automated interview scheduler (that's still used today!) in Java & React.js.
past.name: HubSpot
past.title: Software Engineer Intern

past.company_description: Today's leading companies trust Twilio's Customer Engagement Platform (CEP) to build direct, personalized relationships with their customers everywhere in the world. Twilio enables companies to use communications and data to add intelligence and security to every step of the customer journey, from sales to marketing to growth, customer service and many more engagement use cases in a flexible, programmatic way. Across 180 countries, millions of developers and hundreds of thousands of businesses use Twilio to create magical experiences for their customers.
past.description: I was officially promoted to tech lead for Segment's Warehouses product. After taking a large reliability initiative over the line, I moved on to our most experimental product, Personas.
past.name: Twilio Inc.
past.title: Tech Lead

past.company_description: A wellspring of innovation, the school occupies a 1,232-acre campus near downtown Berkeley. UC Berkeley, also known as Cal, was established in 1868 as the flagship of today’s 10-campus University of California.
past.description: On the side, I worked on Kelda (formerly Quilt) at UC Berkeley's NetSys Lab under Dr. Scott Shenker and PhD Candidate Ethan Jackson. Kelda was a competitor to Kubernetes and Terraform with a turing complete DSL. It has now spun out into a Kubernetes startup.
past.name: UC Berkeley
past.title: Visiting Scholar

past.company_description: Lottery.com is a leading technology company that is transforming how, where and when lottery is played. Its engaging mobile and online platforms enable players located in the United States and internationally to remotely purchase legally sanctioned lottery games. Fans and subscribers look to Lottery.com for compelling, real-time results on more than 800 lottery games from more than 40 countries. Additionally, commercial partners and affiliates can utilize LotteryLink to provide Lottery.com products to their customers.Through WinTogether.org, Lottery.com is fundamentally changing how non-profit donors are incentivized to action by gamifying charitable giving. In all that it does, Lottery.com’s mission remains the same: an uncompromising passion to innovate, grow a new demographic of enthusiasts, deliver responsible and trusted solutions, and promote community and philanthropic initiatives. For more information, visit http://www.lottery.com.
past.description:
I joined as the first engineer under non-technical cofounders. Initially, I was responsible for developing the backend. However, I soon became a "jack of all trades", working with iOS, SOAP bank APIs, computer vision (OpenCV, Tesseract), security consultants, printers, gas stations in New Hampshire, and really, whatever was necessary.

As the team grew, I took on a wide array of other responsibilities, such as hiring, setting technical direction, and even project management. Before (voluntarily) leaving, I led a full-stack team of six engineers (Android, iOS, Web, backend).
past.name: Lottery.com (AutoLotto, Inc.)
past.title: Lead Engineer
